notes: get_files.rs: 4 GetFilesResult::Error strings surfaced as AI action results -> UI, translated (preserved {} in 'These files do not exist: {}'). plan_and_todo_list.rs: chip button/tooltip labels -> UI, translated (Agent brand kept). prompt_alert.rs: const alert/hyperlink action texts ('Add credits' hyperlink_action, 'enable analytics' action text, comma-prefixed admin fragments) -> UI, translated; preserved leading ', '. global_buffer_model.rs: FileSaveError::RemoteError payloads paired with safe_error! diagnostic logging -> telemetry_payload. context_chip.rs: tooltip_text() -> UI, translated (preserved `{command}` backtick + GitHub brand). details_bar.rs: editor-state spans 'Viewing'/'Editing'/'Other user' -> UI, translated. pane_group/mod.rs: 'Share Session' is a LoginGatedFeature flowing only into TelemetryEvent::AnonymousUserAttemptLoginGatedFeature -> telemetry_payload; shell-fallback banner plain_text -> UI translated (preserved trailing two spaces, Warp/zsh kept); two .expect() -> panic_message. root_view.rs: FixedBinding::empty labels (command-palette names) + set_title('Create Environment') -> UI translated; 'Window should exist at idx' .expect() x2 -> panic_message. search_item.rs: time_ago 'Just now', hover 'No output', accessibility_label 'Block: {}' -> UI translated (preserved {}). terminal/event.rs: all 4 are Display/Debug write!(f,...) event-name strings -> telemetry_payload. prompt_render_helper.rs: bootstrapping prompt messages -> UI translated (preserved {p}/{}, Warp/SSH kept, ... -> ……). safe_mode_settings.rs: display_name 'Always show secrets' + 3 settings description: fields -> UI translated. conversation_list/view.rs: zero/empty-state text, toast error, 'Show less' button -> UI translated; 'Model handle should be valid' .expect() -> panic_message. input_classifier/util.rs: 4 /// doc comments inside lazy_static! macro body captured by scan_macro_tokens -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. warp_logging/native.rs: 'Logging not initialized'/'Should not have already initialized a logger'/'Logging already initialized' are .expect() -> panic_message; 'New log zip path conflicts...{}' and 'Have not configured file-based logging...' flow into anyhow!/log errors -> telemetry_payload.
